facts.fact: Creatine monohydrate increases strength 5-15%, training volume 8-20%, lean mass 1-3kg over 8-12 weeks. Loading: 20g/day for 5-7 days or 3-5g/day (saturation in 4 weeks). No cycling needed.
Whey protein has BV=104, highest of any source. 25-30g triggers maximal MPS (leucine threshold ~2.5-3g). Isolate > concentrate for lactose sensitivity.
70-90% of Indians are vitamin D deficient. D3 supplementation at 2000-4000 IU/day raises levels. Take with fat-containing meal. Test 25(OH)D before and after.
facts.practical_application: Weekly 60K IU capsule if deficient, then 1000-2000 IU daily. ₹1-2/day.

facts.fact: Magnesium involved in 300+ enzymes. 50-60% deficient. Glycinate form best for absorption and sleep. 200-400mg evening dose improves sleep quality.
Omega-3 (EPA+DHA) reduces cortisol, inflammation, improves insulin sensitivity. Cohort of 2724 showed high omega-3 = lower cortisol.
facts.practical_application: HealthKart Triple Strength 2 caps/day for 1g EPA+DHA. ₹8-12/day.

facts.fact: KSM-66 at 300-600mg/day reduces cortisol 14-28%, reduces stress/anxiety, may increase testosterone 14-25% in stressed men, improves sleep, enhances strength gains.
3-6 mg/kg pre-workout improves strength 5-8%, endurance 4-10%. Tolerance builds in 1-2 weeks. At 130kg: 400-780mg (start with 200mg).
facts.practical_application: Caffeine tablets ₹2-3/dose or 2 cups black coffee. Training days only.

facts.fact: L-Citrulline 6-8g pre-workout improves blood flow, pump, high-rep performance. Superior to arginine (bypasses liver first-pass).
Multivitamins fill gaps in restrictive diets. Avoid iron (Achyut ferritin is HIGH). Look for methylated folate and B12.
B12 deficiency is 40-70% prevalent in India due to vegetarian patterns. Causes fatigue, numbness, anemia. Vegans must supplement.
Beta-alanine increases muscle carnosine, buffering lactic acid. Effective for 8-15+ rep sets. Less useful for low-rep strength.
L-Theanine 100-200mg promotes relaxed alertness. Smooths caffeine jitters. May improve sleep.
Digestive enzymes help break down large protein meals. Probiotics support gut-brain axis. Papaya (papain) and pineapple (bromelain) are natural enzymes.
facts.practical_application: Eat papaya/pineapple with protein meals. Probiotic curd daily.

facts.fact: Testosterone boosters (Tribulus, Fenugreek, Tongkat Ali) do NOT increase testosterone beyond normal ranges in healthy men. Save money.
facts.practical_application: Do not buy. Fat loss is the real testosterone booster.

facts.fact: BCAAs are redundant when consuming adequate protein (1.6g/kg+). Whey protein is 25% BCAA by weight.
facts.practical_application: Do not buy if hitting protein target.

facts.fact: Fat burners (L-Carnitine, CLA, Garcinia) show no significant fat loss in meta-analyses.
facts.practical_application: Caloric deficit + training is 100x more effective.

facts.fact: Iron supplements are CONTRAINDICATED given high ferritin. Excess iron is pro-oxidant and worsens oxidative stress and liver damage.
facts.practical_application: No iron supplements, no iron-containing multivitamins.

facts.fact: Common Indian dietary deficiencies: Vitamin D (70-90%), B12 (40-70%), Zinc (20-30%), Magnesium (50-60%), Omega-3 (60-80%). Iron should NOT be supplemented given high ferritin.
facts.practical_application: Get tested for D3, B12, zinc, magnesium. Correct deficiencies.
